name: Kandji Devices Missing EDR Agent
description: Identifies Kandji-managed devices missing an approved EDR/antivirus agent
query: SELECT d.device_id, d.device_name, d.user_email FROM kandji_devices d WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM kandji_device_apps a WHERE a.device_id = d.device_id AND (LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%sentinelone%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%crowdstrike%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%falcon%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%carbon black%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%defender%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%sophos%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%elastic%'))
remediation: Deploy an approved EDR/antivirus agent (SentinelOne, CrowdStrike, Microsoft Defender, etc.) via Kandji.
